sources.title: Firepower - Full Movie
sources.description:
Two undercover cops risk it all by going deep inside a federally sanctioned haven of gambling, prostitution, drugs and violence, to bring down a psychotic criminal mastermind.

#freemovie #fullmovie #crime #thriller

metadata.Plot: A merc is hired by the F.B.I. to track down a powerful recluse criminal. A woman is also trying to track him down for her own personal vendetta.
metadata.Writer: Gerald Wilson, Bill Kerby, Michael Winner
metadata.Actors: Sophia Loren, James Coburn, O.J. Simpson
